creator: john@zoner.org
text:
The port ubh depends on the port news/p5-News-Newsrc, which was upgraded to version 1.08.  That version requires perl 5.6.  The perl5 port is forbidden.

$ ubh
syntax error at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.005/News/Newsrc.pm line 1, near "use 5.6"
BEGIN failed--compilation aborted at /usr/local/bin/ubh line 415.

Fix: 

Upgrade base to perl 5.6.1
or
downgrade news/p5-News-Newsrc (to 1.07?)
How-To-Repeat: Install news/ubh
run ubh
